text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur follows her self-devised summer camp
training schedule as planned.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Aghhh. It is way too damn hot...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Well, it's going as planned except for Air
Shakur's increasingly rough tone.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Enough. Let's take a break first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I grab some drinks and come back to find Air
Shakur reviewing race footage.
choice_data_list: Is this that British race from the other day?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Yep.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur is deeply engrossed in her analysis.
Watching her, I can almost picture her running in
the UK one day.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Curious?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's all right, I'll show you. I just finished gathering
all the data I need.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm creating a simulation that'll show how well I
could hold my own in top international races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur presses the enter key and an aerial
view of the track appears on the screen. Seven
marker arrows are lined up at the starting gate.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: The blue one is me. Watch carefully.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When the race begins, the arrow markers move
along the course. Air Shakur hangs at the rear of
the pack before making a move from the far
outside lane on the final straight. However...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I can't gain ground.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fifth marker makes a move at the same time
and effortlessly speeds past the finish line, while
Air Shakur finishes fifth.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Well, it's pretty much what I expected.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
This racecourse has harsher elevation changes
than Nakayama, making it a tougher race in
general. If we included it in our current race
schedule, this would be the outcome.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The other runners are just too far above my
level—both in terms of abilities and experience.
choice_data_list: It's a big world out there.
It's a big world out there.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Exactamente!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: It's a big world. You could say it's too big even!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ugh, not you, Pearl...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Seeking the Pearl, a well-traveled
Umamusume who has achieved great success in
G1 races around the world.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Don't be so bashful, Shakur. You know you're
welcome to think of me as "Big Sis".

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Go ahead and try again! Ready?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: ...Ready?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Shy as always, are we? You're what they call "le
shy beauty à la mode."

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
By the by, it seems the two of you wish to become
more worldly, no?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: I can answer any questions you might have.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing, really! Ask me anything about the
world's finest cuisines, breathtaking sightseeing
spots, or legendary tales! My head is a suitcase
stuffed with worldly wisdom!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
What would you like to know? Fire away! No need
to hold back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think Seeking the Pearl may actually have some
fascinating stories to share, and I'd like to show
some appreciation for taking the trouble to offer.
choice_data_list: I'd like to hear about international cuisine.

Could you give us some tips for traveling the
world?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Oho! You get it!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
If you're someone with a strict meal schedule,
dining abroad can be pretty troublesome...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: I know! Come with me!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
When in Rome, do as the Romans do! So on that
note, let me show you how to eat ice cream!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: How is this international cuisine?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Oh my. Even you haven't noticed?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Noticed what?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Ice cream is a real delicacy in the summer!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...I'm outta here.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Local dishes are created to suit the local
environments. You could even say they help the
body adapt to said environment.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
When in Rome, eat what the Romans do! It's a
menu of worldly delights!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's way too much of a stretch. I'm not
buying it.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Why don't you try for yourself and see?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Open wiiide!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Not a chance! Get away from me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching them reminds me of an older sister
doting on her younger brother. I've seen a new
side to Air Shakur I never knew existed.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeees!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
But of course! Well then, shall we take a stroll
around the globe?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That's right! We have the means to do so right
before our very eyes!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: We only have to look as far as... your computer!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Are you ready? Then, we're off on our journey
around the world!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur pushes the enter key and a world map
appears. It's just like we're taking a leisurely stroll
across it.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
If had to sum up the trick to navigating the world,
I would say...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: It takes guts!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: That's right! Guts!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Ohhh yeah! Guuuts!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Will you two shut the hell up?!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Ah! There goes the illusion...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You're just spoutin' nonsense.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If you're gonna give us tips, make 'em useful—like
how to pick the best routes, the traits of different
racecourses, or how to fit them into your race
schedule. Something like that.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: But having guts is useful!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
What you're essentially saying is that preparing to
travel takes time and should be given proper
consideration.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Then, first and foremost, you need to find the
guts to follow through with your plans, and the
guts to deal with whatever unexpected things
come your way once you're there.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
You need the guts to ask yourself whether you
should really considering traveling the world...
and where the world you desire truly lies.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
If you ever do decide you'd like to go out into the
world, don't hesitate to ask!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Yeah, right.
